ui.choosecharacter.label.deadnow:
R. I. P.
(You are being redirected. If you do not redirect in 10 seconds, log out then back in.)
ui.choosecharacter.label.reallydelete: Wait, you want to delete a character?!
ui.choosecharacter.label.reallydelete.in: Deleting a character is permanent. Really permanent. To confirm you really want to do this, type the full name of your character below. Capitalize the name correctly! You owe your poor character at least that much.
ui.choosecharacter.label.toomanycharacte: NOTE: You have too many characters - probably because your VIP status has lapsed. You can only see the most recently played characters, but the others are still there! They will be hidden until you become a VIP again, or if you choose to delete any of those visible characters in which case one of your hidden characters will appear in the now-empty slot.
ui.choosecharacter.tooltip.maxdeletions: Cannot delete - you can only have one dying character at a time
ui.choosecharacter.tooltip.oldmodel: This character is using an old model! Update its appearance to a new model by clicking 'Update Model' above.
ui.choosecharacter.tooltip.vipcharacter: This is a bonus character slot for being a VIP member. If you stop being a VIP, you will lose access to the character in this slot at that time. You can regain access by becoming a VIP member again, or by deleting characters from the other slots. Note that characters are ordered with the most recently used first.

ui.createcharacter.cutscene.3m: Finish his mind-wipe and prepare him for transit...
ui.createcharacter.cutscene.4f: {0} will be my pet project from now on.
ui.createcharacter.cutscene.4m: {0} will be my pet project from now on.

ui.createcharacter.error.cannotload.sex: You can't load that preset - it's for the wrong sex!
ui.createcharacter.error.name: Name is required
ui.createcharacter.errorsavefailed: Preset save failed: no response from server
ui.createcharacter.options.label.head: Head
ui.createcharacter.options.label.hmm: For use with the "Skin Decoration" framework. If you don't know what that is, don't click this button
ui.createcharacter.options.tooltip.rando: Randomize Sets random values for all sliders, colors, and Features

This will clear the preset.

ui.createcharacter.preset.deleted.label: Preset Deleted
ui.createcharacter.preset.help.body: What is a Preset? A preset is a collection of sliders, colors, and features that make up a character. A preset can be used as either a standalone character or a starting point for further customization. Each race/sex combination has its own presets.
ui.createcharacter.preset.help.label: Preset Help
ui.createcharacter.preset.load.body:
This will overwrite all the sliders, colors, and features you currently have selected.

Are you sure?
ui.createcharacter.preset.load.label: Load Preset?

This will overwrite your current Preset #{0}.

Are you sure?
ui.createcharacter.preset.save.label: Save Preset?

ui.createcharacter.race.Dwarf.label.name: Dwarf
ui.createcharacter.race.Elf.label.name: Elf
ui.createcharacter.race.Elf.lore.0:
Elves are forest-loving, sex-addicted, and obsessively clean. They're never crude or offensive, but they do tend to add double entendres to everything they say.

They live a long time and tend to master a lot of skills, but prefer to live a simple life when possible.
ui.createcharacter.race.Elf.lore.1: Everyone knows that it's nearly impossible to piss off an elf... they're just so friendly and patient! But if you DO get them angry somehow, they never forgive and they never relent.
ui.createcharacter.race.Elf.lore.2: Humans say: "They're friendly and honest, but don't be fooled: all elves are disgusting perverts. They're probably charm-rapists, too!"
ui.createcharacter.race.Elf.lore.3: Rakshasa say: "Their laws are surprisingly primitive, they're prone to bouts of depression that last for decades, and they're constantly washing their hands. But they're generous and fair, in their way."
ui.createcharacter.race.Elf.lore.4: Orcs say: "They become set in their ways and then they're easily manipulated. They're dangerous warriors, but then they get annoyed by blood and dirt. That's hilarious. You can't tell from looking whether an elf is a warrior or a wizard or just a farmer, so be careful picking fights."
ui.createcharacter.race.Elf.lore.5: Geography: The nearest elven country is Verta, which recently suffered a horrific disaster. Dwyndarre was a major metropolis that was completely destroyed by an unknown force. Some survivors have fled to the Council Lands.
ui.createcharacter.race.Fae.label.name: Fae
ui.createcharacter.race.Fae.lore.0: Fairies aren't just from another planet -- they're from another realm of existence with its own rules of time and physics. They are true immortals, and most are so many centuries old that they can't recall their youth at all.
ui.createcharacter.race.Fae.lore.1: Everyone knows there are four types of fairies, one for each season. The Winter and Spring fae are dangerous and scary. The Summer and Fall fairies are more reasonable. (All player fairies are assumed to be Summer fae.)
ui.createcharacter.race.Human.label.name: Human
ui.createcharacter.race.Human.lore.0: Humans are notoriously prudish and petty, but they are extremely loyal to their friends and allies. They value honesty and hard work, and hate lazy people.
ui.createcharacter.race.Human.lore.1: Everyone agrees that humans make excellent traders and negotiators.
ui.createcharacter.race.Human.lore.2: Elves say: "They're rude and greedy. And for how much they hate sex, you'd be surprised how horny they are. But they make great friends! They love accumulating wealth."
ui.createcharacter.race.Human.lore.3: Rakshasa say: "They're trustworthy merchants and they make charismatic leaders. They love feeling in control... it makes them happy. They work incredibly long hours."
ui.createcharacter.race.Human.lore.4: Orcs say: "The smart ones have silver tongues and can trick an orc out of his breakfast. But the dumb ones are dumber than any orc! Their warriors are no match for orcs, but their wizards are feared. Human merchant camps are neutral ground, so try not to burn those down too often."
ui.createcharacter.race.Human.lore.5: Geography: The first country you'll explore is called The Council Lands, where humans are the most populous race. The laws are very human-centric: slavery, homosexuality, and mind-affecting magics are outlawed, while taxes and hard work are the norm.
ui.createcharacter.race.Orc.label.name: Orc
ui.createcharacter.race.Rakshasa.lore.0: Rakshasa originally came from another world, where they were fierce and amoral warriors. But since becoming stranded on this world, new generations of rakshasa have developed a sense of morals and righteousness. They are still learning to combine their warrior instincts and their newfound sense of fairness.
ui.createcharacter.race.Rakshasa.lore.1: Everyone knows that rakshasa are quick to anger, but most are also quick to forgive. They're also known for their complex sense of justice and their dry sense of humor.
ui.createcharacter.race.Rakshasa.lore.2: Although their capital city is quite advanced, many rakshasa have recently "gone savage", as the humans put it, leaving their cities and forming camps in the wilderness. It's unclear why.
ui.createcharacter.race.Rakshasa.lore.3: Humans say: "There's two kinds: the city dwellers and the nomads. The city ones keep slaves, which is obscene. But the nomads are pretty lazy, preferring to hunt for sport rather than work to improve themselves."
ui.createcharacter.race.Rakshasa.lore.4: Elves say: "Talking with rakshasa is exhausting. It's so easy to upset them! But they're pretty open about sex, and they're very generous."
ui.createcharacter.race.Rakshasa.lore.5: Orcs say: "Rakshasa are good allies, 'cuz what's not to like about a swordfighting tiger? But never trust 'em. They can turn on you in a second. One second they're helping you 'achieve justice,' and the next second 'you've gone too far and now you must die.' Watch your back around 'em."
ui.createcharacter.race.Rakshasa.lore.6: Geography: Rakshasa control a small area of land that is largely inhospitable to other races. Their holdings abut both the Council Lands and the Crone Hegemony, and they have made an uncomfortable peace with their neighbors.
ui.equipslot.head: Head Gear
ui.itemtooltip.combatrefresh.header: Combat Refreshes from <color=#00D1FF>Basic Attacks</color> restore an additional:

ui.itemtooltip.installable.homesguildhal: Can be installed in homes and guild halls

ui.itemtooltip.knows.lorebook.no: You do not have this lore book in your library yet.

ui.itemtooltip.label.appearancereq: Requires a specific animal or beast form
ui.itemtooltip.label.attuneonequip: Note: This item will be attuned to the first player that possesses it.
ui.itemtooltip.label.autoattune: Note: This item will be attuned to the first player that possesses it.
ui.itemtooltip.label.beastreq: Must be an animal or beast
ui.itemtooltip.label.broken: This item is broken! It cannot be used until its missing parts are found.
ui.itemtooltip.label.disabled: This item is not functioning because you no longer meet the usage requirements.
ui.itemtooltip.label.macguffin: This item is needed to complete a certain quest. It has no other use.
ui.itemtooltip.label.meltable: This item can melt in non-freezing environments or when taking Fire damage!
ui.itemtooltip.label.noplayerecon: This item cannot be listed in work orders or sold on the player market.
ui.itemtooltip.label.noplayershops: This item cannot be sold on the player market.
ui.itemtooltip.label.notbeastreq: Not usable by animals or beasts
ui.itemtooltip.label.noworkorders: This item cannot be listed in work orders.
ui.itemtooltip.label.previewable: To view this pet, right-click this item and choose 'More Info'
ui.itemtooltip.label.temporary: This item is temporary and will disappear when you log off. It cannot be placed into storage.
ui.itemtooltip.legacy.permabroken: This Legacy Item has expired and is now permanently broken. Sorry for the inconvenience!
ui.itemtooltip.legacy.permabroken.explan: You can no longer find this kind of item with this configuration, so this shouldn't be used when balance-testing. Visit the "Legacy Item Helper" golem in Serbule for repair/replacement options.
ui.itemtooltip.legacy.willbreakon: This <color=red>Legacy Item</color> will permanently break on
ui.itemtooltip.meal: This is a meal. Meals stack with snack foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.
ui.itemtooltip.req.rarity: Target item must be rarity {0} or higher
ui.itemtooltip.snack: This is a snack. Snacks stack with meal foods; you can eat one of each and get the benefits of both.
ui.itemtooltip.subtitle: Title: {0}
ui.itemtooltip.warbond.now: This War Bond can be redeemed at the Statehelm Bank for {0} Councils at <color=green><nobr>{1}</nobr></color>
ui.itemtooltip.warbond.time: This War Bond can be redeemed at the Statehelm Bank for {0} Councils at <nobr>{1}</nobr>
ui.itemtooltip.wine.aging: This wine is aging and will gain +{0} Doses at:
ui.itemtooltip.wine.aging.warning: Note: drinking any of this wine will end the aging process.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaCasino.0: The daily casino excursions are a great way to earn some extra councils, and maybe make some new friends!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaCave1.0: Goblins are master artisans, but most other races refuse to trade with them for ethical reasons.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaCave1.1: Goblins don't have a word for 'please'. But they do have a word that means 'I'll owe you a favor'.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaCave1.2: Goblins will mate with anything. It's said that bugbears are the offspring of goblins and their pet bears.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaCave1.3: Goblins have a reputation as perverted and sadistic slavers.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaCave1.4: The goblin slave trade has been booming thanks to an influx of fairy refugees. Fairies make docile, if fragile, slaves.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaDesert1.0: Since few players report bugs, bugs you encounter may be unknown to the developers. Please report bugs!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaDesert1.1: Not so long ago, Ilmari was a verdant country under Crone Hegemony rule. During the Rakshasa War, crone mages destroyed the environment as a tactical maneuver.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaDesert1.2: At the end of the Rakshasa War, the crones buried everything they couldn't take with them in the sand. Some say entire crone troop regiments were buried alive.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaDesert1.3: Settlements such as Amulna are tiny pockets of life in the vast and merciless Ilmari Desert.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaDesert1.4: You can weave instant-cast abilities while channeling. Try it out!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaEltibule.0: The daily casino excursions are a great way to earn some extra councils, and maybe make some new friends!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaEltibule.1: Transmutation is a skill used to modify your items by using Phlogiston. Seek out Kalaba in Eltibule for more info.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaEltibule.2: Be sure to stop and smell the roses. Literally! Flowers in your inventory can be Appreciated to increase your Power.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaEltibule.3: Are you being shunned because you're dirty? Hop into a nearby fountain or lake to clean off!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaGazluk.0: Gazluk Plateau has been the home of one orc tribe or another for thousands of years.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaGazluk.1: The Council created a settlement in Gazluk a few years ago, but due to limited resources and hostility from orcs, things did not go well.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaGazluk.2: Gazluk City is a modern orcish city built atop an ancient keep. Visitors are not welcome -- not even other orc clans.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaGazluk.3: The Snowblood Orcs have camps throughout Gazluk, waiting for the signal to attack Gazluk City.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaKurMountains.0: All orcs, both male and female, must pass the Challenge of Blades at age 15. Failures die, and are not mourned.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaKurMountains.1: Orcs are not very fond of slaves: too weak, or else too dangerous. They never take prisoners of war.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaKurMountains.2: Humans and orcs have very similar biology. Orcish sages believe that humans are a weak offshoot race.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaKurMountains.3: Kur is ostensibly under Council rule, but the Snowblood Orcs have claimed it as their own, and the Council seems to be ignoring them.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaKurMountains.5: Want to always Autopsy, Skin, and Bury your corpses? Bind them all to the same key!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaKurMountains.6: Transmutation is a skill used to modify your items by using Phlogiston. Seek out Kalaba in Eltibule for more info.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaKurMountains.7: The First Aid skill can mend broken bones and cure many diseases. Invest in it yourself, or ask others for help!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaPovus.0: Wearing metal boots protects you from swamp ticks.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaPovus.1: Keep leeches off of you by swimming in organic-type leg armor, such as Kelp Leggings or Ri-Shin Pants.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaPovus.2: Chopping trees or mining rocks in Povus can lead to encounters with ratkin. There are even more of them at night.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaPovus.3: Only a year ago, Povus was a growing Rakshasa town. Today there are few permanent residents.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaPovus.4: Giant mushrooms appeared on the horizon soon after the town of Povus died.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaPovus.5: Most of the ranalon in Povus are less than a year old, but they fight with incredible prowess.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaPovus.6: A year ago, orcs attacked Povus in retaliation for a perceived act of war.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaRahu.0: Rakshasa born on their homeworld of Ravana can shapechange at will, but the ones born here are stuck in a single form.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaRahu.1: Rahu is named after a horrific creature that lives on the ancestral rakshasa homeworld of Ravana.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaRahu.2: Rakshasa that are born in Rahu have a sense of morality. The elder rakshasa from Ravana consider morality to be a disease.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaRahu.3: The word 'evil' is often a political term in Rahu. Outsiders who don't understand the nuances of rakshasa culture should avoid the word.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaRahu.4: After the Rakshasa War ended, the Council inadvertently started a second war with Rahu. The 'Sand War' is over, but tensions are still high.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaRahu.5: You can weave instant-cast abilities while channeling. Try it out!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaSerbule.0: The Trade channel can be accessed by typing '/c trade' in chat.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaSerbule.1: Other players can't take your items out of the Community Storage in Serbule.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaSerbule.2: Don't drop items on the ground, feed them to the Sentient Flame in Serbule Keep to level up your Civic Pride instead!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaSunVale.0: Oysters have much better chances of containing ultra-rare Black Pearls when they are harvested during a New Moon.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaSunVale.1: Kraken lay their eggs during the full moon.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaSunVale.2: Despite the name, Sun Vale isn't a valley. It's a chain of tiny islands off the coast of Verta.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaSunVale.3: Sun Vale's largest island is the site of a three-way battle between Druids, Ranalon, and fairies of the Winter Court.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaSunVale.4: Long ago, Sun Vale was home to a sect of Arisetsu worshippers. Their ruined temples are now inhabited by all sorts of creatures.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaSunVale.5: Cloth Armor may not be the most protective, but it can vastly improve your Power regeneration!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaTomb1.0: The Serbule Crypt was sealed long ago, but was accidentally re-opened when Council engineers rebuilt the town.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.AreaTomb1.1: Poison can be negated by certain alchemical potions.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.0: Some favor requests are much harder than others.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.1: You can write spoilers in chat with triple brackets [[[like this!]]]
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.10: A few kinds of monsters can Evade your attacks. Stuns temporarily disable Evasion, and abilities with Accuracy can bypass it.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.11: Don't fight on an empty stomach! A piece of fruit can be eaten as an emergency measure, but a home-cooked meal will make a huge difference.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.12: Running out of Power too often? You may need better food. High-quality foods can make a huge difference!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.13: There's a lot of craft skills. Don't try to master them all at once! Focus on one or two and buy needed parts from other players.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.14: Carpentry is surprisingly versatile, letting you craft utility items, storage chests, and even some wooden equipment.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.15: Alchemy is a crafting skill that no learned wizard should ignore. It's needed for many advanced magical tasks.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.16: Obtain a skinning or butchering knife to get extra resources from the beasts you slay.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.17: Not sure where to start with crafting? Try surveying. You'll find a lot of resources that you can use or sell to others.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.18: There are said to be 37 gods, but once there were even more.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.19: The Council is a group of five mages, each with powers that rival the gods.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.2: The first time you complete a new recipe, you get a big bonus to XP.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.20: The Crone Hegemony is a large country adjacent to The Council Lands. They aren't friendly.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.21: Goblin tribes are commercial entities. Warriors sign a five-year contract and are fiercely loyal until the contract ends.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.22: All hat-wearing giant mantises are intelligent to some degree.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.23: Borghild is an ancient burial site. Twenty years ago, the Duke of Serbule led an adventuring team into it, but never returned.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.24: Ever since the Duke of Eltibule was mysteriously assassinated, all attempts to tame that land seem to run into bad luck. Weird.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.25: It's said that fairies are true immortals, but they certainly seem afraid of death.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.26: Three generations ago, the rakshasa were a race of merciless killing machines without empathy. But something changed them.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.27: Elves sometimes absentmindedly pet rakshasas' fur as if they were cats. This is a major faux pas.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.28: Almost all orcs are in the military. Orcs keep few possessions, and they value silence over empty words.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.29: The elven metropolis of Dwyndarre was destroyed two years ago. A million elves died, and their whole country still mourns.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.3: If you bury a monster, it will be replaced by a new monster more quickly.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.30: Only humans and dwarves use their last names in public.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.31: A massive demon army has recently invaded Alharth. The Council wizards trapped them within gigantic crystal walls. Problem solved!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.32: Not sure what an item is good for? Right-click it and choose 'More Info'
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.33: You can sort your recipes by level instead of alphabetically. Just right-click the recipe list and change the sort order.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.34: Running out of room? Certain belts will give you more inventory space!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.35: You can configure your Chat Tabs by right-clicking on them.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.36: Meals and Snacks are different types of food - the benefits from both of them stack!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.37: Meditation: For More Than Just Unarmed!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.38: Report bugs by clicking the encircled ! icon in the top-right.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.39: Joining a guild can provide opportunities to group at all levels.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.4: Caves and dungeons are often the best places to find new armor and weapons.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.5: Raising one skill often gives bonus levels in another skill. Bonus levels can raise a skill above its level cap!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.6: When a vendor runs out of cash, you can wait a week... or do favors for them. Each new Favor Level unlocks more cash immediately!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.7: The '!' icon over a monster's head means that they've shouted for help.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.8: Monsters don't shout for help until you attack them. Sometimes you can lure them away from their friends first.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Default.9: If you have an item or ability that 'Taunts +20', the target will think you did 20 more damage to it, causing it to hate you more.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Tutorial.0: Alharth's waters are full of mysteries. By default, press F to dive and R to rise!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Tutorial.1: Inventory overflowing? Increase your Favor with certain NPCs to unlock their Storage!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Tutorial.2: Running out of map pins? Surveying, Foraging, Civic Pride, and Treasure Cartography will unlock more!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Tutorial.3: The Trade chat channel can be a great place to request special items or crafted gear.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Tutorial.4: Favor is how much an NPC likes you. Increase your Favor with certain NPCs to unlock storage, training options, and more!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Tutorial.5: You can increase your Favor with an NPC primarily by doing favors for them or gifting them items.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Tutorial.6: Thinking of selling an item? Sometimes it's better to gift it to an NPC to increase their Favor!
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Tutorial.7: Most monsters have a purple Rage meter. When it fills up and blinks, look out! They're about to use a powerful attack.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Tutorial.8: The '!' icon over a monster's head means that they've shouted for help.
ui.loadingscreen.tip.Tutorial.9: Monsters don't shout for help until you attack them. Sometimes you can lure them away from their friends first.
ui.loadouts.emptyloadout.explanation: A Loadout is a snapshot of your active skills, abilities, and equipment. You can switch to a different loadout at any time (except during combat). Save your current settings to this slot?
ui.loadouts.emptyloadout.label: Empty Loadout
ui.loadouts.howtounlockfirstloadouts: You don't have any loadouts yet! You'll unlock the first loadouts when you have a combat skill at level 25.
ui.loadouts.howtounlockmoreloadouts: This loadout is locked. You can unlock additional loadouts by raising more combat skills to 50.
ui.loadouts.popup.confirmoverwrite: Really replace the contents of loadout '{0}' with your current gear and ability settings?
ui.loadouts.popup.rename: Renaming '{0}'. Enter the new name for this loadout.
ui.loadouts.save.name: Name:
ui.loadouts.title: Loadouts
ui.login.button.newguest: Let me log in as someone else
ui.login.button.sameguest: Yes, log me in as the same Guest!
ui.login.chooseserver.instructions: Choose a server. Your character will live on this server. You can create characters on other servers, but you cannot transfer characters or items between servers. They are each separate worlds. (The content on each world is identical, so don't worry about this decision too much.)
ui.login.confirm.newaccount: Okay! We'll set up a new game account for you, {0}.

ui.tutorial.step1.body:
Welcome! This is a game about exploration, and your first task is to find a way off this island. We'll give you 60 seconds of combat training and then set you off to explore on your own.

There's a backpack nearby with some useful stuff. Pick it up!
ui.tutorial.step1.title: Welcome to Project: Gorgon!
ui.tutorial.step10.body: Your new Front Kick ability will propel a monster away from you. That will be handy when you're fighting two monsters at once. Give it a try.
ui.tutorial.step10.title: Kick!
ui.tutorial.step11.body:
That's all the basics you need to get started. Now you can explore the island!

See if you can find the way to the mainland. If you get stuck, try asking for help in chat. Good luck!
ui.tutorial.step11.title: You're Ready To Explore
ui.tutorial.step12.body: Dying is a learning experience. When you die in new and interesting ways, you earn XP in the Dying skill. This will yield great benefits in the future, so keep it up!
ui.tutorial.step12.title: You Died! Congratulations!
ui.tutorial.step13.body: Different parts of this island are harder than others. If you're running into a problematic opponent, you might be able to avoid them. (But, of course, dying in new ways is its own reward!)
ui.tutorial.step13.title: Don't give up!
ui.tutorial.step2.body: You found some food and a sword. Eat the food and equip the sword! Press the backpack icon on the right of the screen, then right-click the food and sword icons in your inventory.
ui.tutorial.step2.title: Get Ready For Battle
ui.tutorial.step3.body: Eat the food in your inventory, too! Eat one ration and save the rest for later. The benefits of food last for an hour.
ui.tutorial.step3.title: Eat the Food
ui.tutorial.step4.body: There's some feeble old skeletons nearby. Walk up, click on one, then press the sword attack button at the bottom of the screen to hit it. Repeat as needed.
ui.tutorial.step4.title: Try Your Sword Out
ui.tutorial.step5.body: Yeah, that's the way! Now take that skeleton's loot.
ui.tutorial.step5.title: Good!
ui.tutorial.step6.body: You found armor. Equip that! It will give you Armor points, which help keep you alive. When you're attacked, half the damage is absorbed by your Armor and the other half by your Health. (See the bars at the top of the screen?) If you run out of Armor, all the damage goes to Health instead. If you run out of Health, you die.
ui.tutorial.step6.title: You Found Armor
ui.tutorial.step7.body:
Great! Now your Armor bar will fill up.

Kill another skeleton with the sword. That should give you enough Sword XP to raise your level. You might want to use a punch attack, too. (That's the icon beneath the sword attack -- the little fist.) That way you'll gain XP with both Sword and Unarmed skills.
ui.tutorial.step7.title: Kill Another One
ui.tutorial.step8.body: Your new Parry ability depletes a monster's Rage. (That's the little purple bar under their health bar.) When their Rage is full, they can do a special Rage Attack. Skeleton swordsmen's special move will stun you -- very annoying! Try out your Parry ability. Use it when their rage meter is getting full.
ui.tutorial.step8.title: Parry!
ui.tutorial.step9.body: Whenever you win a fight, you earn experience points (or "XP") for the skills you used during the battle. It's a good idea to use an ability from both of your combat bars so that you earn XP for both of your active combat skills. They'll both level up and you'll gain new abilities.
ui.tutorial.step9.title: Use Both Ability Bars
